title: US and Iran trade threats to unleash 'hell' as search for missing US airman continues
snippet: Iran rejected Trump's ultimatum for a deal to re-open Strait of Hormuz. Both sides trading threats of hell.

title: Trump shares footage of Tehran ablaze, says killed Iran's top military leaders
snippet: Trump posts video of Tehran strikes, claims killed top Iranian military officials. 5 hrs ago.

title: Trump gives Iran 48 hours before 'all Hell will reign down'
snippet: Trump issues 48-hour ultimatum: make a deal or open Hormuz or face devastating consequences.

title: Iran says it rejects Trump offer of 48-hour ceasefire
snippet: Iran rejected Trump's 48-hour ceasefire in writing, launched heavy attacks including on Kuwait.

title: Trump gives Iran 48 hours to make a deal as search for US pilot continues
snippet: Trump: 'Remember when I gave Iran ten days - now 48 hours. Make a deal or open the Hormuz.'

title: Iran's IRGC stopped Israeli-linked vessel on fire in Strait of Hormuz
snippet: IRGC drone hit vessel in Strait of Hormuz. Ship currently on fire. Maritime escalation.

title: IRAN FM ARAGHCHI: Israel-US bombed Bushehr nuclear plant four times. Radioactive fallout will impact GCC capitals.
snippet: Araghchi warns of radioactive fallout from Bushehr strikes affecting Gulf capitals.

title: US F-15E shot down over Iran - Military Times
snippet: First manned US aircraft shot down by enemy fire in Operation Epic Fury. One crew rescued.

title: US arrested relatives of Qasem Soleimani
snippet: US ICE arrested niece and grand-niece of Qasem Soleimani.

title: France made deal with Iran behind Trump back to get ship through Hormuz
snippet: France bypassed US to negotiate Iran oil shipment. War legitimacy questioned.

title: China-Pakistan present new Iran deal ceasefire for opening Hormuz
snippet: China and Pakistan presenting new deal with ceasefire for opening Hormuz.

title: 40-country coalition led by UK to secure Strait of Hormuz
snippet: International Hormuz coalition forming. Netherlands led by UK.

title: Germany requires all men aged 17-45 to get Bundeswehr permission before leaving country
snippet: Germany military mobilization of young men. Unprecedented domestic policy.

title: Global energy crisis: Middle East oil product exports -63% in March. Biggest in history.
snippet: Middle East oil exports -63% in March. Global energy crisis worst on record.

title: Gasoline crossed $4 per gallon for first time since August 2022
snippet: US average gasoline hits $4/gallon first time since August 2022.

title: CDS volume Q1 2026 surges +69% to record $4.5 trillion
snippet: World credit default swap volume at record high. Exceeds tariff turmoil levels.

title: Europe markets third biggest dump in a decade as flows go full capitulation
snippet: European markets capitulating. Worst flows in decade.

title: Hedge funds sold world equities fastest pace in 10 years. Short/long ratio 7.6:1
snippet: Hedge funds aggressively shorting global stocks. 4th consecutive monthly sale.

title: PRESIDENT TRUMP: 'Keep the oil, anyone?'
snippet: Trump quote on Iran: Keep the oil, anyone? High engagement 561K views.

title: Trump: US hasn't even started destroying what's left of Iran
snippet: Trump: U.S. hasn't even started destroying what's left. War escalation continues.

title: Trump cant fund child care Medicare because of Iran war
snippet: Trump: US cant fund child care Medicare because of Iran war.

title: Iran War enters Day 36. Trump says Iran is 'begging for a deal.' Iran FM rejects all.
snippet: Day 36 of war. Trump claims Iran begging for deal. Iran FM Araghchi denies negotiations.

title: Macron criticises Trump approach: 'Be serious... don't speak every day'
snippet: Macron publicly criticizes Trump's contradictory stance on Iran war.

title: Iran FM Araghchi denies negotiations, rejected US 15-point proposal - NYT
snippet: Iran FM Araghchi denies formal negotiations. Iran rejected all US proposals.

title: US to leave Iran 'pretty quickly' and return if needed, Trump tells Reuters
snippet: Trump tells Reuters: US to leave Iran pretty quickly and return if needed.
